title: Foundations of Computational Interaction Participant Data Management Plan
description: A frozen, study-specific instance of the Participant Data Management Plan (Participant_Data_Management_Plan.md). No study is authorized by the plan template alone; this instance must be frozen before collection. Controls are recorded as explicit attestations rather than defaults, so an unattested control reads as not-satisfied.

data_categories.description: Declared classes of data collected. Full prompts, direct identifiers, protected attributes, free-form sensitive text, and precise location are prohibited unless named here as specifically approved and necessary.

access_roles.description: Named roles authorized under deny-by-default access.

retention.description: A retention and deletion rule for every declared data class.

basis.description: Frozen outcome or governance requirement justifying retention.

delete_by.description: Calendar date or named triggering event.

deletion_mechanism.description: Must cover primary, derivative, export, and backup handling, with an auditable disposition record.

export_rules.description: Logging of recipient, purpose, fields, transformations, agreement, consent basis, and expiration for any export.

reuse_scope.description: Aligned with the consent record's future_reuse enum. New use outside consent or authority requires review before transfer.

controls.description: Explicit attestation for each required control. Every control must be attested true for a plan to be complete.

withdrawal_process.description: Append-only withdrawal handling; original consent records are never overwritten.
